question:
Five hazard classes that require placarding in any amount are ______.
1) None of these
2) Explosives 1.1, Dangerous, Flammable 3, Explosives 1.4, and Oxidizers 5.2
3) All of these
4) Poison Gas 2.3, Dangerous When Wet 4.3, Explosives 1.3, Explosives 1.2, and Explosives 1.1
5) Explosives 1.1, Corrosive 8, Flammable 3, Explosives 1.4, and Poison 6.1
canonical_answer: Poison Gas 2.3, Dangerous When Wet 4.3, Explosives 1.3, Explosives 1.2, and Explosives 1.1

appears_in.title: Hazmat Endorsement Nj
appears_in.answer: Poison Gas 2.3, Dangerous When Wet 4.3, Explosives 1.3, Explosives 1.2, and Explosives 1.1
